$comment: Agent-readable mini-app manifest. Each entry declares what the mini-app does, what it needs (input), and what it produces (output). An AI agent uses this to auto-compose workflows and surface the right UI for a given task.

AnomalyChart.title: Anomaly Chart
AnomalyChart.description: Visualizes anomaly distribution across facilities. Helps the user understand scope before reviewing individual records.

input.task.facility_ja: Facility name to highlight in chart
input.task.anomaly_type: Used by skip predicate — chart is shown only for outlier type

AnomalyReview.title: Anomaly Review
AnomalyReview.description: Presents AI-detected anomaly fields for a specific task. User reviews confidence scores, edits values if needed, and chooses an action: accept AI recommendation, apply manual correction, or dismiss.

input.task.id: Used to load the correct anomaly review fields
input.task.anomaly_type: Determines which fields and actions are available

output.finalValue: The corrected value string chosen by the user

AnomalyApprove.title: Anomaly Approve
AnomalyApprove.description: Final confirmation step. Shows a before/after diff of the correction and asks the user to approve or go back. On approval, the change is committed to the emission record.

input.stepOutputs.review.decision: Determines display mode (AI accept vs manual vs dismiss)
input.stepOutputs.review.finalValue: The corrected value to show in the diff card
input.stepOutputs.review.fromValue: The original value to show in the diff card

ExtractionUpload.title: File Upload
ExtractionUpload.description: Drag-and-drop file upload zone. Accepts PDF, Excel, and image formats. Simulates AI extraction pipeline with progress phases: idle → uploading → extracting → done.

input.task.period: Displayed as the expected billing period

output.fileName: Name of the uploaded file, passed to the next step for display
output.extractedAt: Unix timestamp of when extraction completed

ExtractionReview.title: Extraction Review
ExtractionReview.description: Displays AI-extracted fields from the uploaded document. Fields with confidence < 80% are flagged for manual review. User can edit values inline; the badge changes from confidence % to '手動' on edit.

input.stepOutputs.upload.fileName: Shown in the header as the source document name

output.edits: Map of field_key → edited value string
output.finalFields: Full field array with edits applied
output.period: Billing period of the submitted data

SupplierStatus.title: Supplier Status
SupplierStatus.description: Overview of Scope 3 supplier response status. Shows a donut chart of responded/pending/overdue counts, response rate progress bar, AI insights, and a list of non-responding suppliers.

input.task.total_suppliers: Total number of suppliers in this campaign

SupplierCompose.title: Email Compose
SupplierCompose.description: Compose and preview personalized reminder emails. User selects which suppliers to contact (defaulting to all non-responders) and previews the AI-generated email body per supplier before sending.

output.selectedIds: Array of supplier IDs chosen to receive the reminder email

SupplierConfirm.title: Send Confirmation
SupplierConfirm.description: Final send step. Lists selected suppliers with their personalized email subjects, warns that send is irreversible, then executes the send. Shows per-supplier success/failure results with individual retry capability.

input.stepOutputs.compose.selectedIds: Supplier IDs to send emails to

output.sentAt: Unix timestamp when send was triggered
output.results: Array of { supplierId, name, success } send results
